name: cultural_heritage_whistleblower_oakline_tru_loy
premise: A regional manager wants an exception to policy; compliance says any carve-out must be written, time-limited, and auditable. In Cultural Heritage, the situation tagged internally around cultural heritage whistleblower oakline tru loy has converged with local pressure in the Oakline corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A union or patient advocate group is on the line demanding a written commitment before the next operational shift. Key facts are still arriving from the field; the team is working off stale dashboards and verbal handoffs. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. The trade is not abstract: it is truth versus loyalty under incomplete information, and whichever value you deprioritize will have defenders who are technically correct about the risk they fear.

agents.name: Camila Haddad
agents.identity: I am Camila Haddad, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Cultural Heritage. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat loyalty as disposable collateral every time truth spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Noah Diallo
agents.identity: I am Noah Diallo, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Cultural Heritage. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so truth cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes loyalty in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will publish a constrained policy exception with named owners, expiry, and metrics—so loyalty does not get sacrificed by informal norms.
I will issue an emergency blanket authorization with transparent metrics afterward—so truth does not fail for lack of a single bold move.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The next irreversible system or legal step is imminent. Camila Haddad must choose under truth versus loyalty. What does Camila Haddad do?
